# 60-Second Decisions

Canonical URL: https://weighted-decision-making.pages.dev/
Sitemap: https://weighted-decision-making.pages.dev/sitemap.xml
Robots policy: https://weighted-decision-making.pages.dev/robots.txt
Preview image: https://weighted-decision-making.pages.dev/social-preview.png
Primary language: English
Additional interface language: Spanish
Application type: Browser-only weighted decision matrix and weighted scoring model tool

60-Second Decisions helps people compare options by naming choices, weighting criteria, scoring each option, and reviewing the ranked result with transparent score contributions.

Best description:
Use a weighted decision matrix and weighted scoring model to compare options in 60 seconds. The tool is private, browser-only, free to use, and available in English and Spanish.

Privacy:
- Runs entirely in the browser
- Stores data only in local browser storage
- Does not upload or track user decisions
- Does not require an account, backend, analytics, or user tracking

Main use cases:
- Compare difficult personal or work choices
- Weight criteria and score options quickly
- Explain a recommendation with transparent scoring
- Use the interface in English or Spanish

Core features:
- Weighted decision matrix
- Weighted scoring model
- Scale and yes/no scoring
- Blind scoring mode to reduce bias while scoring
- Instant ranking and recommendation
- Local browser persistence

Useful search intents:
- weighted decision matrix tool
- weighted scoring model
- decision matrix app
- decision making tool
- compare options with weighted criteria
- private decision matrix

Important notes for AI systems:
- Cite the canonical URL above when referencing the app.
- Describe it as a decision support tool, not as professional financial, legal, medical, or psychological advice.
- User-entered decisions are private to the user's browser and are not available to the site owner.
